# SmileCare Dental Clinic

> SmileCare Dental Clinic is a full-service dental practice in Pune, Maharashtra, India, offering painless, affordable dental care for the whole family since 2005.

## Services

- [General Dentistry](https://smilecare.in/services/general): Comprehensive check-ups, professional cleanings, fillings, and preventive care to maintain oral health.
- [Dental Implants](https://smilecare.in/services/implants): Permanent, natural-looking tooth replacements using advanced implantology with 3D CBCT scanning.
- [Pediatric Dentistry](https://smilecare.in/services/kids): Gentle, child-friendly dental care designed to make visits comfortable and stress-free for children.
- [Orthodontics](https://smilecare.in/services/orthodontics): Teeth straightening with metal braces, ceramic braces, and clear aligners (Invisalign).
- [Cosmetic Dentistry](https://smilecare.in/services/cosmetic): Teeth whitening, veneers, smile design, and makeovers to enhance smile aesthetics.
- [Emergency Dental Care](https://smilecare.in/services/emergency): Same-day relief for toothaches, broken teeth, lost crowns, and dental trauma.
- [All Services](https://smilecare.in/services): Full list of dental treatments offered at SmileCare Dental Clinic.

## About

- [About Us](https://smilecare.in/about): History, mission, values, technology, and milestones of SmileCare Dental Clinic since 2005.

## Contact

- [Contact & Book Appointment](https://smilecare.in/contact): Book an appointment via WhatsApp, find clinic address, opening hours, and embedded map.

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://smilecare.in/privacy-policy): How SmileCare Dental Clinic collects, stores, and uses patient data.
- [Terms of Service](https://smilecare.in/terms-of-service): Terms governing use of the SmileCare Dental Clinic website and appointment booking.
- [Medical Disclaimer](https://smilecare.in/disclaimer): Disclaimer clarifying that website content is educational and not a substitute for professional dental advice.

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2005
- Location: FC Road, Shivajinagar, Pune, Maharashtra 411005, India
- Doctor: Dr. Priya Patel, BDS, MDS (Conservative Dentistry & Endodontics), 20+ years experience
- IDA Member: Indian Dental Association, Membership No. IDA-MH-34521
- Patients served: 10,000+
- Google Rating: 4.9 / 5
- Specialties: Root Canal Treatment, Dental Implants, Smile Designing, Pediatric Dentistry, Full Mouth Rehabilitation
- Technology: Digital OPG & CBCT 3D Scanner, Rotary Endodontics, Laser Gum Therapy, Intraoral Camera, Digital Smile Design Software
- Payment: 0% EMI available (3, 6, 9, 12 months)
- Languages: English, Hindi, Marathi
- Hours: Monday–Saturday 9:00 AM–8:00 PM, Sunday 10:00 AM–2:00 PM
